title: Malty Shattering Mediterranean Lamb Skewers
description: A low-carb Mediterranean dish featuring malty flavors and shattering textures, perfect for a brunch mood. This recipe combines the brightness of rice vinegar with the richness of mantecare-emulsified lamb.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together rice vinegar, olive oil, garlic, lemon zest, malt syrup, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve immediately.
